## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**ECN_HEADER** -> ECN_AUTH (AUTH_LIST -> LIST); USER_INFORMATION (ORIGINATOR -> USER_ID)

**ECN_HIST_HEADER** -> ECN_HEADER (ECN_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, ECN_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX); USER_INFORMATION (ORIGINATOR -> USER_ID)

**ECN_HIST_LINES** -> ECN_HEADER (ECN_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, ECN_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX); USER_INFORMATION (SIGNOFF_USER -> USER_ID)

**ECN_HIST_NOTES1** -> ECN_HEADER (ECN_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, ECN_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX)

**ECN_HIST_NOTES2** -> ECN_HEADER (ECN_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, ECN_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX)

**ECN_HIST_NOTE_1** -> ECN_HEADER (NOTE_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, NOTE_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX)

**ECN_HIST_NOTE_2** -> ECN_HEADER (NOTE_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, NOTE_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX)

**ECN_H_NOTES** -> ECN_HEADER (NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX); USER_INFORMATION (USERID -> USER_ID)

**ECN_LINES** -> ECN_AUTH (AUTH_SEQ -> SEQ); ECN_HEADER (ECN_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, ECN_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX); USER_INFORMATION (SIGNOFF_USER -> USER_ID)

**ECN_NOTES** -> ECN_AUTH (SEQ -> SEQ); ECN_HEADER (NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX); USER_INFORMATION (USERID -> USER_ID)

**ECN_NOTES1** -> ECN_AUTH (NOTES_SEQ -> SEQ); ECN_HEADER (ECN_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, ECN_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX)

**ECN_NOTES2** -> ECN_AUTH (NOTES_SEQ -> SEQ); ECN_HEADER (ECN_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, ECN_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX)

**ECN_NOTE_1** -> ECN_HEADER (NOTE_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, NOTE_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX)

**ECN_NOTE_2** -> ECN_HEADER (NOTE_NUMBER->ECN_NUMBER, NOTE_PREFIX->ECN_PREFIX)

**ECN_USER_TABLE** -> ENG_TBL_DESC (USER_TABLE -> TABLE_NAME)
